The '''Wedding of [[Nrin Vakil]] and [[Koyi Komad]]''' took place sometime between the end of the [[Thrawn campaign]] and the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. [[Anki Pace]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] were among the attendees, as presumably were other members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1stm}}

|es=Boda de Nrin Vakil y Koyi Komad
}}
